REDCapExploreR 0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Understanding Quality Report Outputs

Package index

Pull REDCap Data

Retrieve REDCap project data and metadata from the API.

pull_redcap_project()
Pull REDCap project data for quality reporting

Build Codebooks

Build and view REDCap project codebooks.

build_codebook()
Build a REDCap codebook
save_codebook()
Save a REDCap codebook viewer
view_codebook()
View a REDCap codebook as interactive HTML tables

Build Quality Reports

Build exploratory REDCap data quality reports.

build_quality_report()
Build a REDCap data quality report

Record Status Dashboard

Recreate and plot REDCap Record Status Dashboard data.

build_record_status_data()
Build Record Status Dashboard data
plot_record_status()
Plot Record Status Dashboard data

Data

Synthetic REDCap-shaped datasets for examples and documentation.

mock_redcap_project
Mock REDCap project
mock_record_status_data
Mock Record Status Dashboard data
mock_codebook
Mock REDCap codebook
mock_quality_report
Mock REDCap quality report
